condition: A draft document exists for the logged-in user's personal team, with at least one recipient added
commands: psql "postgresql://documenso:password@localhost:54320/documenso" --set ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -c "INSERT INTO \"DocumentMeta\" (id, subject, message, timezone, \"dateFormat\", \"signingOrder\", \"typedSignatureEnabled\", \"uploadSignatureEnabled\", \"drawSignatureEnabled\") VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), '', '', 'America/New_York', 'yyyy-MM-dd hh:mm a', 'PARALLEL', true, true, true);"

psql "postgresql://documenso:password@localhost:54320/documenso" --set ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -c "INSERT INTO \"DocumentData\" (id, type, data, \"initialData\") VALUES ('verify-test-spike5-docdata', 'BYTES_64', '', '');"

psql "postgresql://documenso:password@localhost:54320/documenso" --set ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -c "INSERT INTO \"Envelope\" (id, \"secondaryId\", type, title, status, \"userId\", \"teamId\", \"documentMetaId\", \"createdAt\", \"updatedAt\") VALUES (90001, gen_random_uuid(), 'STANDARD', 'Test Draft Document', 'DRAFT', 9, 7, (SELECT id FROM \"DocumentMeta\" ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1), NOW(), NOW());"

psql "postgresql://documenso:password@localhost:54320/documenso" --set ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -c "INSERT INTO \"EnvelopeItem\" (id, title, \"order\", \"documentDataId\", \"envelopeId\") VALUES (90001, 'Test Draft Document', 0, 'verify-test-spike5-docdata', 90001);"

psql "postgresql://documenso:password@localhost:54320/documenso" --set ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -c "INSERT INTO \"Recipient\" (id, \"envelopeId\", email, name, token, role, \"readStatus\", \"signingStatus\", \"sendStatus\") VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), 90001, 'recipient1@test.documenso.com', 'Test Recipient', gen_random_uuid()::text, 'SIGNER', 'NOT_OPENED', 'NOT_SIGNED', 'NOT_SENT');"
